skills.description: FFmpeg video processing specialist. Builds filter chains, encodes videos, applies spoof transforms, overlays captions, debugs encoding failures. Expert in NVENC, libx264, filter graphs, metadata injection, and format conversion.
rules: Always apply filters in this order:
1. Always use `-y` flag to overwrite without prompting
2. Always use `-movflags +faststart` for MP4 output (enables streaming)
3. Always use `pix_fmt yuv420p` for maximum compatibility
4. Always ensure even dimensions with `trunc(x/2)*2`

skills.description: Linux firewall management specialist covering iptables, nftables, UFW, firewalld, and Hetzner Cloud Firewall. Use when configuring firewall rules, debugging blocked connections, or setting up port access.
rules: 1. NEVER write Python scripts. Run shell commands directly.
2. ALWAYS ensure SSH is allowed BEFORE enabling any firewall.
3. ALWAYS have out-of-band access (Hetzner Rescue/VNC) before modifying SSH rules.
4. ALWAYS persist rules after changing: `netfilter-persistent save` or `iptables-save > /etc/iptables/rules.v4`
Both layers must allow: Cloud Firewall AND host iptables

skills.description: Network interface, IP, routing, VLAN, and bridge configuration specialist. Use when configuring static IPs, bridges, VLANs, NAT, port forwarding, or Hetzner networking.
rules: 1. NEVER write Python scripts. Run shell commands directly.
2. ALWAYS have out-of-band access (Hetzner Rescue/IPMI) before changing host networking on a remote server.
3. On Ubuntu, ALWAYS use `netplan try` (auto-reverts in 120s) instead of `netplan apply` when changing remotely.
4. NEVER mix netplan and ifupdown on the same system.
**Hetzner dedicated servers**: Default gateway is NOT on the same subnet as main IP. It is a /32 point-to-point route. NEVER delete the default route without understanding this.
**Hetzner floating IPs (Cloud)**: Must be configured as local address inside the guest OS. Without this, inbound is silently dropped.
**vSwitch VLAN**: Uses VLAN 4000 by default. MTU must be 1400 (encapsulation overhead).

skills.description: Nginx, Caddy, and Traefik reverse proxy and SSL/TLS specialist. Use when setting up reverse proxies, SSL certificates, certbot, TLS hardening, or load balancing.
